rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE CAPALLA SETTLEMENT TRUSTS TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) It appears the majority of the request for attorney fees (~$7,000) was related to requesting withdrawals from blocked accounts. The total requested to be withdrawn from the blocked accounts was ~$6,000. Court to determine whether full fees should be allowed. 2) ~$2,800 was charged to prepare the petition to approve these accountings, which had minimal transactions. 3) Petitioner requests waiver of future accountings and also requests the court waive the need for court approval for payment of attorney's fees.

rulings.Case Title: GUARDIANSHIP OF ROWAN STRUMMER TELLES
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) Despite a court order requiring additional bond to be filed once assets were distributed from minor's father's estate, and despite order for final distribution being filed on 8/29/18, Petitioner failed to request an increase in bond until 4/22/19. Appropriate bond has now been filed. 2) Court to determine reasonableness of attorney fee request and whether accounting should be approved. 3) Court to determine whether minor's interest in LLCs are being adequately handled.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE CHARLES B. WILSON DTD 4/13/88 REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Recover Real And Personal Property Assets Transferred From Trust Without Consideration And For Double Damages And Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: a. The petition does not contain adequate description of intangible personal property requested to be confirmed to the subject trust, and the notices filed on 5/24/19 and 6/18/19 do not contain the mandatory language required under Probate Code §851(c)(1) for the intangible personal property. b. Petition requests Probate Code §859 relief, but the notices filed on 5/24/19 and 6/18/19 do not contain sufficient §851(c)(2) language. c. Proposed order has not been submitted.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE VISHWAS NARURKAR TRUST DATED JAN-24-2019
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition Re: (1) Removal Of Successor Trustee Michael F. Hirner; (2) Appointment Successor Trustee; (3) Compel Surrender Of Trust Property To Successor Trustee; (4) Order Award Attorney'S Fees And Costs To Petitioner; (5) Surcharge Michael F. Hirner For Professional Fees And Costs; (6) Compel Trustee Accounting; And (7) Violation Of California Welfare And Institutions Code Section 15610 Et Seq.
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 8/7/19. (No earlier date available.) No courtesy copy of the amended petition and no proposed order has been delivered to the assigned Examiner. [LRSF 2.7 B., 14.6 A., and 14.93 G.] Trusts require 30 days' notice and an amending pleading requires the same notice as the pleading it amends. If a full copy of the trust was also missing from the amended petition (as it was from the original petition), a verified supplement to the amended petition must be filed to provide the copy of the trust. The names and last known addresses of all vested or contingent beneficiaries were missing from the original petition. [CRC 7.902.]

[LRSF 2.7 B., 14.6 A., and 14.93 G.] Item 8 of the petition does not appear to indicate who the beneficiaries of the devisee trust are. [Prob. C. Section 1208 and LRSF 14.26 D.2.]
